scope.subject: Mathematics
scope.purpose: Prerequisite-aware adaptive routing for a 3-8 homeschool math spine. Grade is a placement prior; mastery evidence can move a student up, down, or across strands.

adaptive_strands.label: Place Value and Operations
adaptive_strands.description: Whole-number size, operations, rounding, estimation, and fluency foundations.

adaptive_strands.label: Fractions and Decimals
adaptive_strands.description: Fraction concepts, equivalence, decimal notation, and rational-number readiness.

adaptive_strands.label: Ratios, Rates, and Percent
adaptive_strands.description: Ratio reasoning, proportional relationships, rates, and percent applications.

adaptive_strands.label: Expressions, Equations, and Functions
adaptive_strands.description: Patterns, variables, equations, functions, and symbolic reasoning.

adaptive_strands.label: Geometry and Measurement
adaptive_strands.description: Shapes, measurement, coordinate geometry, transformations, similarity, and volume.

adaptive_strands.label: Data, Probability, and Statistics
adaptive_strands.description: Tables, graphs, center, probability, two-way tables, scatterplots, and sampling.

adaptive_strands.label: Problem Solving and Modeling
adaptive_strands.description: Multi-step word problems, modeling, error analysis, performance tasks, and applications.

policy.root_module_rule: Modules with no prerequisites are valid diagnostic roots or backfill roots. They should be short enough to verify quickly before assigning later content.
policy.prerequisite_rule: A module may depend on prior-grade same-concept content and same-grade enabling concepts. Same-grade dependencies must point to lower sequence_order modules.
policy.adaptation_rule: Use diagnostics and recent evidence to choose the next module by strand. Strong mastery can advance to challenge_targets; repeated misses should assign remediation_targets first.
